title: cestrum franceyi
intro: Cestrum franceyi, also known as the Night-blooming Jasmine, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cestrum franceyi include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and ulcers. Cestrum franceyi is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
